fileTabs.content: select /*+ parallel(ama) parallel(cs) parallel(mc1) parallel(bal)            use_hash(ama cs mc1 bal) */   ama.accid, --   case when ama.status in ('8','9') then     'Attrition'   when mc1.is_delinquent = 1 then     'Delinquent'   when cs.accid is null then     'New' --   when nvl(bal.is_scheme_active,0) = 1 then     -- *** Active ***     case when cs.curr_val_credits >= cs.curr_prev_balance then       -- *** Full Payer ***       case when cs.curr_statement_balance_total > 1 then         'Full Payer (Current)'       else         'Full Payer'       end     else       -- *** Not Full Payer ***       -- Probably cannot have credits of less than #1       -- making following condition superfluous       -- Otherwise credits of less than the balance       -- where the balance is #1 or less will slip into 'Unknown'       case when cs.curr_val_credits > 1 and cs.curr_int = 'Y' then         'Revolver'       else         'Unknown'       end     end --   else     -- *** Inactive ***     case when cs.curr_int = 'Y' then       -- *** Interest Charged ***       -- Probably no interest charged on balances of #1 or less       -- making following condition superfluous.       -- Otherwise any balances of #1 or less       -- where interest has been charged slip into Unknown       case when cs.curr_statement_balance_total > 1 then         'Paying Down'       else         'Unknown'       end     else       -- *** No Interest Charged ***       case when cs.curr_statement_balance_total between 0 and 1 then         'Dormant'       -- Superfluous       when cs.curr_statement_balance_total < 0 then         'Inactive Credit Balance'       else         'Unknown'       end     end   end segment -- from    (   select /*+ parallel(ama) */     ama.accid,     ama.acc_num,     ama.status   from all_monthly_accounts ama   where ama.source_system_code = 'C'     and ama.acc_type in ('001','010','011','012')     and clientid is not null   ) ama, --   (   select /*+ parallel(mc1) */     mc1.accid,     case when mc1.delq_210_days + mc1.delq_180_days + mc1.delq_150_days +           mc1.delq_120_days + mc1.delq_90_days + mc1.delq_60_days +           mc1.delq_30_days > 0 then 1 else 0 end is_delinquent   from account mc1   where mc1.acc_type in ('001','010','011','012')   ) mc1, --   (   select /*+ parallel(cs) */       cs.accid,       min(decode(rnk,1,cs.periodid,null)) curr_period,       min(decode(rnk,2,cs.periodid,null)) prev_period,       nvl(min(decode(rnk,1,cs.gbp_current_bal,null)),0) curr_statement_balance_total,       nvl(min(decode(rnk,2,cs.gbp_current_bal,null)),0) prev_statement_balance_total,       nvl(min(decode(rnk,1,decode(cs.interest_flag,'0','N','Y'),null)),0) curr_int,       nvl(min(decode(rnk,2,decode(cs.interest_flag,'0','N','Y'),null)),0) prev_int,       nvl(min(decode(rnk,1,cs.gbp_credit_amt,null)),0) curr_val_credits,       nvl(min(decode(rnk,2,cs.gbp_credit_amt,null)),0) prev_val_credits,       nvl(min(decode(rnk,1,cs.gbp_prev_bal,null)),0) curr_prev_balance     from       (       select /*+ parallel(cs) */         accid,         periodid,         gbp_current_bal,         interest_flag,         gbp_credit_amt,         gbp_prev_bal,         rank() over (partition by accid            order by periodid desc, statement_date desc) rnk       from (select /*+ parallel(cs1) */         accid,         periodid,         statement_date,         sum(gbp_current_bal) gbp_current_bal,         sum(decode(interest_flag,'N',0,'Y',1,0)) interest_flag,         sum(abs(gbp_credit_amt)) gbp_credit_amt,         sum(gbp_prev_bal) gbp_prev_bal         from storecard_statement_summary cs1         group by accid, periodid, statement_date) cs) cs         where rnk <= 2       group by cs.accid     ) cs,   --   (   select /*+ parallel(bal) */     accid,     DECODE(storecard_scheme_active,'Y',1,0)      is_scheme_active   from MRT_SCARD_TRANS_DERIVATIONS   ) bal -- where ama.accid = mc1.accid (+)   and ama.accid = cs.accid (+)   and ama.accid = bal.accid (+)
